subject: Shared frontend module styling
fact: Generic cross-role filter, detail, and module layout classes should live in src/main/webapp/assets/css/components/module-surfaces.css and be imported from main.css, not from role-specific page stylesheets.
reason: Future role pages and audits need a stable styling boundary so generic UI primitives are not reintroduced under admin, organizer, volunteer, or student page-scoped CSS files.
